channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Will a winter storm hit the US over Thanksgiving week? Here's what forecasts show so far
item.description: WINDSOR, Calif. (AP) — Forecasters warned over the weekend that another round of winter weather could complicate travel leading up to Thanksgiving in parts of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: GODOFREDO A. VASQUEZ and OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Israeli strikes in central Beirut kill at least 20 as diplomats push for a cease-fire
item.description: BEIRUT, Lebanon (AP) — Israeli airstrikes Saturday in central Beirut killed at least 20 people, officials said, as the once-rare attacks on the heart of Lebanon's capital continued without warning while diplomats scrambled to broker a cease-fire.
item.dc:creator: ABBY SEWELL and BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Fred Harris, former US senator from Oklahoma and presidential hopeful, dies at 94
item.description: Fred Harris, a former U.S. senator from Oklahoma, presidential hopeful and populist who championed Democratic Party reforms in the turbulent 1960s, has died.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Israeli-Moldovan rabbi living in UAE is missing. Israeli officials fear he may have been kidnapped
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — An Israeli-Moldovan rabbi living in the United Arab Emirates has gone missing, with Israeli authorities raising the suspicion Saturday he may have been kidnapped as tensions remain high with Iran.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL and ELEANOR H. REICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A man called 911 for help during a home invasion. Las Vegas police fatally shot him
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — A Las Vegas man called for police help during a home invasion before an officer fatally shot him, according to authorities and 911 calls. Brandon Durham called 911 early Nov.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Driver in crash that killed 4 kids was allegedly photographing ‘Welcome to Florida’ sign
item.description: A New York man was extradited to Florida this month after he was accused of causing a deadly crash when he came to a near-stop on Interstate 95 to take photo of the "Welcome to Florida" sign.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, ABC 4

item.title: Hyundai, Kia recall over 200K electric cars over power issues
item.description: Hyundai’s recall encompasses over 145,000 cars, including some IONIQ 5 and IONIQ 6 EVs along with Genesis GV60, Genesis GV70 and Genesis G80 models.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KREX 5

item.title: Glen Powell to star in latest hit: a look-alike competition
item.description: After an appearance in "Top Gun: Maverick" and leading roles in "Anyone but You," "Hitman" and "Twisters," Austin native and Hollywood A-lister Glen Powell is set to star in his latest smash hit: A look-alike competition.
item.dc:creator: Kelsey Thompson, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Texas education board approves optional Bible-infused curriculum for elementary schools
item.description: Texas’ education board voted Friday to allow Bible-infused teachings in elementary schools under optional new curriculum that could test boundaries between religion and public classrooms in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Nadia Lathan, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Here are the most heated Thanksgiving food fights
item.description: Thanksgiving dinner may be one of the most anticipated meals of the year for many people, but it is also one of the most debated. From the correct way to prepare the turkey to the best side dishes and desserts, here are the dishes worth fighting over this Thanksgiving.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Alabama carries out third nitrogen hypoxia execution in the country
item.description: Carey Dale Grayson, 50, fought his restraints and raised both middle fingers just before gas was administered, a witness said.
item.dc:creator: Asher Redd, WGN 9

item.title: Trump names Seb Gorka, Alex Wong to be senior national security staff
item.description: President-elect Trump has tapped his first term alums Alex Wong and Sebastian Gorka to join his national security team for his second go-around.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, NewsNation

item.title: Jelly Roll pays tribute to Oklahoma teen who died from fentanyl
item.description: The 19-year-old died from a fentanyl overdose in May 2023, while attending Cameron University. Rain, who thought she was taking a Xanax, turned out the pill was laced with fentanyl.
item.dc:creator: Mario Gonzalez/KFOR, KTLA 5

item.title: Trump taps NFL player Scott Turner as head of HUD
item.description: Turner serves as the chair of the Center for Education Opportunity at America First Policy Institute, a Trump-aligned think tank.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Unsolved Ohio: Columbus woman missing for nearly seven years
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) – A direct message that said "You can unlock the door, I'm close" is the last known communication from a woman who disappeared while walking to a friend's Columbus home nearly seven years ago. LeShay Dungey was 19 years old when she vanished on Jan. 24, 2018.
item.dc:creator: Ava Boldizar, NewsNation

item.title: Bodycam shows shooting of teenage murder suspect in northeast Columbus
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) – Columbus police have released footage of a shooting in which officers shot a teenager wanted for murder. Sgt.
item.dc:creator: Adam Conn, NewsNation

item.title: Family hoping for justice after podcast covers decades-old central Ohio cold case
item.description: COLUMBUS, Ohio (WCMH) – A podcaster has wrapped up her investigation into a decades-old central Ohio cold case, giving the victim’s family hope of finally receiving justice. John “Bernie” Burnside, 32, was found dead in his Marysville home on Dec.
item.dc:creator: Ava Boldizar, NewsNation

item.title: John Hopkins surgeon and COVID contrarian Marty Makary selected to lead Trump’s FDA
item.description: President-elect Trump has picked Marty Makary, a Johns Hopkins's surgeon who has espoused contrarian views about the COVID-19 pandemic, to lead the Federal Drug Administration. Makary is a surgical oncologist at Johns Hopkins University and an author.
item.dc:creator: Sophia Vento, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump picks Project 2025 author Russell Vought to lead budget office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump tapped Project 2025 co-author Russell Vought to serve as the director of the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) during his second administration. Vought served as Trump's OMB deputy director during his first term in the Oval Office.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, NewsNation

item.title: McDonald's unveils new value menu, extends $5 Meal Deal
item.description: The fast-food giant announced on Friday that it will launch a new everyday value menu on Jan. 7, 2025, which will include exclusive in-app offers, a new Buy One, Add One offer, and the popular $5 Meal Deal.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KRON4

item.title: Trump expected to name investor Scott Bessent as Treasury secretary pick
item.description: Bessent, founder and CEO of hedge fund Key Square Group, served as an economic adviser to the Trump campaign, often appearing on financial talk shows to argue in favor of the president-elect's economic policies.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, Fox 5

item.title: 2 convicted in human smuggling case after Indian family froze to death on US-Canada border
item.description: FERGUS FALLS, Minn. (AP) — A jury convicted two men on Friday of charges related to human smuggling for their roles in an international operation that led to the deaths of a family of Indian migrants who froze while trying to cross the Canada-U.S. border during a 2022 blizzard.
item.dc:creator: MARK VANCLEAVE and MICHAEL GOLDBERG, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Las Vegas man killed by police while on 911 call
item.description: Brandon Durham, 43, of Las Vegas, died at the home on Tuesday, Nov. 12. Police said he was pronounced deceased at a hospital a short time thereafter.
item.dc:creator: Kyle J. Paine, NewsNation

item.title: North Carolina GOP governor nominee vows to keep running after report on racial and sexual comments
item.description: RALEIGH, N.C. (AP) — North Carolina Republican gubernatorial nominee Mark Robinson vowed on Thursday to remain in the race despite a CNN report that he posted strongly worded racial and sexual comments on an online message board, saying he won’t be forced out by “salacious tabloid lies.
item.dc:creator: GARY D. ROBERTSON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: 3 Utah children missing since 2022 found living with FLDS Church, returned to mother
item.description: Three Utah children missing for two years have been located living with members of the Fundamentalist Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, according to the Fredonia Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, WGN 9

item.title: Removal of Pride tree inside library draws controversy from residents
item.description: A Christmas tree that displayed support for the LGBTQ+ community was recently taken down at a public library.
item.dc:creator: Sam Chimenti, NewsNation

item.title: Gaetz says he will not return to Congress
item.description: Former Rep. Matt Gaetz (R-Fla.) said Friday he will not return to Congress after resigning his House seat last week, despite having withdrawn from consideration to be President-elect Trump’s attorney general — but added he is “not going anywhere.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: Trump immigration crackdown: Denaturalization just a drop in the bucket
item.description: President-elect Trump’s incoming administration is expected to take aim at legal immigration, in addition to cracking down on the illegal variety, slowing the pace of application approvals and redirecting resources to look for fraud in old applications, including naturalizations.
item.dc:creator: Rafael Bernal, Fox 5

item.title: Daniel Penny defense rests as final witness reveals Jordan Neely had open warrant, defendant doesn't testify
item.description: Expert witness for the defense, Dr. Satish Chundru, returns to the stand, and Daniel Penny could also testify at his New York City subway chokehold trial.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Clonazepam tablets recalled over 'life-threatening' label mistake
item.description: The company that produces the tablets has said the medication is mislabeled with the incorrect strength on the carton.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Langenfeld, Fox 5

item.title: Emperor penguin who swam to Australia released 20 days after waddling onto beach
item.description: The only emperor penguin known to have swum from Antarctica to Australia was released at sea 20 days after he waddled ashore on a popular tourist beach
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5
